  import pandas as pd
  cat = pd.read_csv("C:\\Users\\Subarna\\Documents\\AI3 run task\\autogen-data-scientist\\data\\benchmark\\kaggle\\henriqueyamata_bank_marketing.csv")
  conversion_by_month = cat["converted"].value_counts().sort_index()
  plt.figure()

  conversion_by_month.plot()
